examples: Psychologists of the Gestalt school maintain that objects are recognized as wholes in a parallel procedure: the internal representation is matched with the retinal image in a single operation.
This is very cosmic. There is a gestalt here.
This article will try to capture the "gestalt" of regular expressions, and let the reader take it from there.
Then they can give it away later with the same energy and creative gestalt that made their for-profit ventures successful.
But, if you gather these advisors together as a team, there is a gestalt that can produce a superior end product.
